text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's our day off, and<n>Matikanefukukitaru and I
have plans<n>to go buy new training clothes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for springing this on you at the<n>last minute,
but I brought a friend<n>along. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I just love me a bit of shoppin'! ♪
choice_data_list: Fine by me. Why the sudden change of plans?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see... The great Shiraoki<n>revealed a
prophecy to me. "On this<n>day, you shall deepen
your<n>connections with the ones close to<n>you."

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly... Is this "Shiraoki" some<n>kinda prophet
or somethin'?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I say we ought to trust the prophet's<n>judgment!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite up to speed, but the<n>three of us end
up going together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is some pretty cool gear. It<n>has fifty
lucky stars on it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ayy, nice one! Put that on and you'll<n>look just like
an American racer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we've got a little extra<n>time on our
hands...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Look over there! See that<n>movie
poster?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: There's a western playing!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw, a spaghetti western! Makesme wanna see a good ol' fashionedMexican standoff. Bang bang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's all go see it! From the looks of<n>it, I reckon
it's sure to be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say that! Thanks a<n>million!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they're playing the same<n>movie on
two different screens.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There's a normal one and an<n>"audience
participation version."<n>...Whatever that means.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, audience participation! That's<n>pretty popular
lately. You get to cheer<n>while you're watching the
movie.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now then, time to decide our fate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Should we sit back and relax, or really<n>immerse
ourselves in the Wild West?
choice_data_list: Let's go to the normal screening.

The audience participation screening sounds
interesting.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I guess it's better to get into a<n>no-nonsense
mood and contemplate<n>the story. I get you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's get movin', Fukukitaru! I<n>reckon we
should get ourselves a<n>supersize servin' of
popcorn for two!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The movie is a classic tale of a band<n>of heroes
coming together to bring<n>peace to a lawless town.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That was super intense, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It shot a hole in my heart, and the<n>winds of the
West are whistling right<n>on through!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Same here! I wanna have a duel! And<n>soak in a
bubble bath while shaving<n>my five o'clock
shadow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Maybe we should start slingin'<n>pistols too...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, that store over there sells gun<n>holsters!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's snap up a matching pair! We<n>can hang them
from our belts and<n>strut around like real cowboys!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! Starting today, we're<n>the
quick-draw sisters of Tracen<n>Academy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Two holsters, please! Also...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Give me one of those<n>auspicious-looking shrine
ropes,<n>please. Wait, it's a lasso?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They both seem to be really happy<n>with their
matching merchandise!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's have a look. Though I<n>am kind of
worried the audience is<n>gonna get real rowdy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine, Fukukitaru! I'm sure<n>we'll have a
blast!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Inside the theater...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Over there, get 'em! Pew pew!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I'm talkin' to you, beardy! Once<n>I count to
three, it's night night!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The audience participation screening<n>turns out to
be a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I really got into it! I feel like<n>I've become a
real rootin'-tootin'<n>gunslinger now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fukukitaru. Who are the<n>gunners running this
outpost here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Why, you and me, of course!<n>When we
team up, the bad guys<n>down in the stronghold
know that<n>they're all outta luck!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They're really getting into their roles.<n>It seems like
the movie has got them<n>feeling as tough as the
heroes of the<n>Wild West.
